hero.text: We're Team Human, a community of builders who believe the best tech starts with empathy, creativity, and real human connection.
beliefs.title: What we believe
beliefs.empathy.title: Empathy First
beliefs.empathy.desc: Great products start with understanding people — not just users, but humans with real needs and emotions.
beliefs.courage.title: Creative Courage
beliefs.courage.desc: AI can optimize, but only humans can imagine what doesn't exist yet. We celebrate the weird, bold ideas.
beliefs.community.title: Community Over Competition
beliefs.community.desc: We grow faster together. Our meetups are spaces where makers share honestly — wins, failures, and everything between.
beliefs.craft.title: Craft Matters
beliefs.craft.desc: In a world of AI-generated everything, the human touch is a superpower. We value intentional, thoughtful work.
team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Real events, real people, real conversations.
team.danny.desc: The best healthcare innovation happens when pharmacists, operators, and investors sit at the same table.
team.dave.desc: The era of vibe coding is here — strategy meets automation, and anyone can build what they imagine.
team.eric.desc: I love to initiate or join projects that can make a positive impact on people's lives.
team.kelly.desc: Empowering startups through genuine connection and the right strategy at the right time.
team.rachel.desc: Design is not just how it looks — it's building, shipping, and iterating with the community.
team.sirial.desc: The right collaboration tool doesn't just organize work — it transforms how a team thinks together.
team.annie.desc: Good design disappears into the experience — what remains is how it made people feel.
team.chedda.desc: Every great product starts with a conversation nobody else is having yet.
footer.tagline: For product makers, by product makers
events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Real events, real people, real conversations. Come build with us.
events.hackathon.title: Cursor Hackathon Seoul
events.buildday.title: Cursor Network Build Day
events.designbuildship.title: Cursor Meetup: Design, Build, Ship
events.meetupseoul.title: Cursor Meetup Seoul
